# GIMP MCP Server (v3.1.1)

> [!NOTE]
> **SOTA 2026 Core Manifest**  
> **Framework:** FastMCP 3.1.1  
> **Architecture:** Portmanteau (8 Tools)  

Professional image editing through Model Context Protocol (MCP) using GIMP.

## Core Services

- **gimp_file**: File operations (load, save, convert, info, validate).
- **gimp_transform**: Geometric transformations (resize, crop, rotate, flip, scale, perspective).
- **gimp_color**: Color adjustments (brightness, contrast, levels, curves, HSL, balance).
- **gimp_filter**: Professional filters and effects (blur, sharpen, noise, artistic).
- **gimp_layer**: Layer management (create, delete, merge, flatten, opacity).
- **gimp_analysis**: Image analysis (quality, statistics, histogram, compare).
- **gimp_batch**: High-performance multi-image processing.
- **gimp_system**: Server health, diagnostics, and documentation.

## Technical Context

- **Entry Point**: `uv run gimp_mcp`
- **Dashboard**: `http://localhost:10772`
- **API**: `http://localhost:10773`
- **Configuration**: `config.yaml` with smart GIMP detection.
- **Standards**: FastMCP 3.1.1 SOTA compliant.

## Documentation Index

- [Installation Guide](docs/installation.md)
- [Implementation Roadmap](docs/IMPLEMENTATION_ROADMAP.md)
- [Development Status Report](docs/DEVELOPMENT_STATUS_REPORT.md)
- [Usage Examples](docs/EXAMPLES.md)

## Portmanteau Patterns

Use category-first dispatching. Instead of 50+ individual tools, all operations are grouped into 8 master tools. AI assistants should first call `gimp_system(operation="tools")` or check the `Tools Explorer` dashboard to introspect available operations and their schemas.
